LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ECOLOGICAL RIGHTS FOUNDATION'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LODGE MANUFACTURING COMPANY IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING AND A PROPOSED JUDGMENT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR	711, CKAREN@SFTC.ORG =(302/HK)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-05-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ryan Landis, Esq. (310-556-1801) for Defendant Lodge Manufacturing through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ECOLOGICAL RIGHTS FOUNDATION's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment. Plaintiff Ecological Rights Foundation's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement as to defendant Lodge Manufacturing Company is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and a proposed Judgment. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/HK)
